function.name: fetch_experiment
function.description: Structured retrieval from ELN database. Accepts any combination of parameters. Pass project_code alone to get project metadata and experiment list. Pass experiment_id or exp_number_full for full experiment detail. Pass days to get recent experiments. Pass chemistry for reaction class search. Pass product_name for fuzzy name search. Pass cas_number for CAS lookup. Empty body returns all projects.

experiment_id.description: Numeric experiment ID for full detail retrieval

project_code.description: Project code e.g. P013E00. Use alone for project summary, combine with days or chemistry for filtered results.

days.description: Return experiments created in the last N days. Use for any recency or date-based query. ALWAYS use this instead of search_experiments for temporal queries. Combine with project_code to scope to one project.

cas_number.description: CAS number to find all projects and experiments for that compound

product_name.description: Fuzzy search across project titles, generic names, and product names

chemistry.description: Reaction class or reagent keyword — searches objective, conclusion, procedure steps, and material names across all experiments

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 50)

function.name: search_experiments
function.description: Semantic + vector search over indexed ELN experiment corpus. Use ONLY for conceptual or exploratory questions: Have we tried X?, What approaches for Y?, Find experiments similar to Z?. NEVER use for date-based, recency, or time-range queries — use fetch_experiment with days for those. Reranker scores above 2.3 = strong hit.

function.name: search_literature
function.description: External chemistry literature search via PubChem and CrossRef. Use for new molecules/CAS numbers not in internal corpus, synthesis routes from literature, or external validation. Always cite DOI or PubChem CID for every claim.

function.name: update_project_notes
function.description: Save a project insight or decision to persistent memory. Call when user shares context not in ELN: final process decisions, abandoned routes, key learnings, next step plans.

note_text.description: The insight to capture, written as a clear factual statement

exp_number_full.description: Optional. Set this when the note concerns one specific experiment, e.g. R&D/P013E00/2606/375. Leave unset for project-level or strategic notes.

note_type.description: 'decision' for strategic/process context (route abandoned, project on hold, key learning). 'data_point' for a specific reported number or correction (a yield, purity, or other measured value not yet confirmed in ELN) — set this whenever exp_number_full is also set.

function.name: get_project_notes
function.description: Retrieve all saved project notes and context for a project. Call at the start of any project query to check for captured insights.

function.name: fetch_project_reports
function.description: Retrieve previously generated analysis reports for a project. Returns report metadata and a concise summary of each report's findings. Call this FIRST whenever answering any project-level question so that prior analysis is used as context rather than repeating retrieval already covered in an existing report.

project_code.description: The project code, e.g. P112P00 or P100P02.
